subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling of the garden of God's love! That which thou didst inscribe was noted, and its meanings were wondrous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بوستان محبت الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید معانی بدیع بود و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
